title: T-024 — Under-receipt PO line force-close service (WH §7.3)
prompt:
# T-024 — Under-receipt PO line force-close service (WH §7.3)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §7.3
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement `forceClosePoLine` service for under-delivery scenarios: operator/manager explicitly closes a PO line with partial receipt, recording reason_code + reason_text + audit row.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/po-line-force-close.ts`: function `forceClosePoLine({po_line_id, reason_code, reason_text})`.
2. reason_code ENUM: 'under_delivery','supplier_discontinued','quality_reject','other'.
3. RBAC: Manager+.
4. UPDATE po_lines.status='force_closed', insert `po_line_force_close_log` row, emit outbox `po_line.force_closed`.

## Files
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/po-line-force-close.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/po-line-force-close.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a PO line with partial receipt 60/100, when force-closed with reason_code='supplier_discontinued', then po_line.status='force_closed' and an audit row exists.
2. Given reason_code='other' without reason_text, when called, then service rejects with V-WH-GRN-008.
3. Given a non-Manager user, when called, then RBAC rejects.

## Test strategy
- RED: `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/po-line-force-close.test.ts` asserting reason gate, RBAC, audit row.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test po-line-force-close`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow force-close without reason_code (V-WH-GRN-008).
- Do not bypass RBAC.

## Dependencies
- T-005
